summary: Books Phase 4 — P&L, Balance Sheet, Late-Fee Accrual end-to-end tested. 13/13 new backend pytest tests pass (P&L shape + math, BS shape + balanced + natural-sign, journal drill-down by account_id/account_number/date_range, late-fee happy-path + idempotency + grace-period skip + admin-only). 31/31 Phase 1-3 regression tests still pass. Frontend Playwright: all 5 tabs (coa/activity/pl/bs/latefees) render with correct data-testids, hash routing works on reload, P&L row click opens drilldown-modal with date/memo/DR/CR + OPEN deep-link, BS shows balanced assets=L+E, Late-Fee tool shows entity dropdown + as-of input + Run Accrual button + result panel. No bugs blocking the feature.

issues: Section subtotal row 'TOTAL ASSETS' appears twice — once at end of Assets section and once again as a big highlighted summary row right below. Visually redundant; consider removing the inline section subtotal so only the big summary row remains.
Uses browser-native window.confirm() instead of a shadcn AlertDialog — works but inconsistent with rest of CRM's modal UX.

action_items: (Cosmetic) BalanceSheetReport renders both section subtotal and big total-assets row — pick one to remove
(Cosmetic) Replace window.confirm with shadcn AlertDialog in LateFeeAccrualTool.run()
critical_code_review_comments: BooksReports.jsx (~417 lines) is under the 700-line threshold but contains 4 logical components — consider splitting into /pages/Books/{ProfitLoss,BalanceSheet,LateFees,Drilldown}.jsx before adding new reports (e.g. Cash Flow, AR Aging).
gl.py report_balance_sheet() calls _account_balances() twice with identical args (once for sections, once for income_rows). Single call would halve aggregation cost.

BooksCOA.jsx has no `hashchange` event listener — if user manually edits the URL hash without a reload, view state doesn't update. Tabs work via clicks (state→hash one-way sync) and via page reload (hash→state on mount), but back/forward navigation across in-page hashes is a dead-end. Add `useEffect(() => { const h = () => setView(...); window.addEventListener('hashchange', h); return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', h); }, [])`.
accrue_late_fees() iterates db.invoices.find(q) sequentially with awaits inside — for >1000 invoices this becomes slow. Consider batching or using asyncio.gather() with concurrency limit.

report_balance_sheet returns `totals.equity_total = equity_accounts + current_earnings` but doesn't show `current_earnings` as its own row in `sections.Equity` — front-end has to render it as a synthesized 'Current-period earnings' row, which is what BalanceSheetReport.jsx does. Documented behavior, works correctly.
Late-fee fixed rate constant (1.5%) is hardcoded in gl.py — should be configurable per entity (e.g. on the entity doc) for future jurisdictions/contracts.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs, hash routing, drilldown, late-fee tool verified)

seed_data_creation: All test invoices/bills created with 'TEST_QA' prefix and DELETE'd in finally blocks. No persistent test residue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 tests at /app/backend/tests/test_books_phase4.py. Late-fee accrual tested with $10k invoice due 2026-04-01 as_of 2026-06-15 → DR 1100=$150 / CR 4200=$150. Posting key is 'late_fee:{YYYY-MM}' on the journal (NOT in posting_key field directly — see gl.post_journal which builds posting_key as 'invoice:{id}:late_fee:2026-06'). Idempotency verified by checking that posting_key unique index prevents duplicates across re-runs. BS balanced check uses 0.01 epsilon. P&L sections natural balance: Revenue/Liability/Equity = credit-positive, Asset/COGS/Expense = debit-positive.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Phase 4 deliverable. Phase 4 ships clean.
